title.rendered: MegaRAC OneTree 2.0: New Release Available Now!

content.rendered:
Elevating Server Management Software for Gen-AI Infrastructure

For over a decade, AMI’s MegaRAC® solution has established itself as a leader in the industry by delivering robust, secure, and developer-friendly BMC firmware technologies and tools. It directly addresses the critical challenges associated with remote server management and has consistently and effectively met the requirements of server manufacturers, hyperscalers, and enterprise data centers.

The Future of Server Management: MegaRAC OneTree™

MegaRAC OneTree – AMI’s OpenBMC-based next-generation BMC manageability firmware solution – incorporates industry best practices and implementations from the Linux Foundation’s OpenBMC™ open-source BMC firmware stack while introducing first-to-market technologies across traditional and AI/HPC optimized servers.

Our latest MegaRAC OneTree 2.0 release illustrates this with native support for AI/HPC infrastructure and hardware, improved system reliability leading to extended server lifecycle in the datacenter, and faster development/qualification time (Faster Time-to-Market) with early access to advanced technologies, silicon IP, and testing.

Breaking New Ground in AI and HPC Management

MegaRAC OneTree sets a new standard in AI and HPC infrastructure management with a host of innovative features:

  • Advanced packages for specialized AI accelerator and system support: Comprehensive support for the latest AI accelerators, processors, and system designs, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance
  • Feature-rich, reliable interface support for reduced downtime: Secure, stable interfaces with standardized protocols for enhanced system/component management, allowing operators to access, update, and recover systems from anywhere, at any time.
  • Multi-silicon support for improved interoperability: Flexible and modular design allowing native support for a broad spectrum of BMC System-on-Chips (SoCs) and host silicon (CPUs/GPUs).

Extending System Life and Maintaining Oversight

MegaRAC OneTree also focuses on extending system lifecycles and maintaining robust system oversight with:

  • Comprehensive hardware and sensor management: Maintain optimal system health and performance with advanced monitoring, telemetry, and RAS capabilities.
  • Enhanced system stability and recovery: Leverage industry-leading features for logging events/crashes, managing alerts, setting up backups, and defining system recovery flow.

Accelerating Development and Qualification Lifecycle

MegaRAC OneTree customers can expect shorter platform development and qualification time – leading to faster time to production – leveraging a thoroughly stress-tested and hardened firmware stack combined with developer-friendly tools and utilities, including:

  • MegaRAC OneTree Development Studio (ODS): Intelligent code editing and platform configuration/porting features for faster development.
  • Improved code quality through in-house and industry-standard validation suites: Industry-proven compliance testing for spec compliance, system performance, HW/FW stability, and industry certification.
  • Regulatory-approved supply-chain utilities: Regulatory compliance and supply-chain security with tools for image signing, SBOM creation, license generation/management, and more.

Stay Ahead of the Curve

MegaRAC OneTree is designed to stay at the forefront of in-demand features and technology trends. Visit our website to learn more about the MegaRAC family of remote management solutions and contact us to help get your MegaRAC OneTree journey started today.

MegaRAC OneTree™ is a trademark of AMI US Holdings, Inc. Open BMC™ is a trademark of LF Projects, LLC in the US and other countries. All other trademarks and registered trademarks are the respective property of their owners.
